cases.title: WHERE: alias exact-match with valid c* suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM customers c WHERE c|

expected.comment: Prefix 'c' exactly matches alias 'c'. Alias-prefix mode activated in schema order.

cases.title: WHERE: CURRENT_TABLE overridden by alias exact-match (pm)
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM payments pm WHERE pm|

expected.comment: Alias-exact-match overrides CURRENT_TABLE priority. Prefix is 'pm': only pm.* columns are valid matches; no function fallback.

cases.title: WHERE: deduplication for us alias (no fallback)
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM user_sessions us WHERE us|

expected.comment: Alias-prefix mode. Prefix is 'us': only us.* columns in schema order, no duplicates and no function fallback.

cases.title: SELECT_LIST: alias exact-match with strict i-prefix

expected.comment: SELECT_LIST with alias-exact-match. Prefix is 'i': only i.* columns in schema order; no extra fallback suggestions.

cases.title: JOIN_ON: alias exact-match with valid c* scalar functions
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM customers c JOIN payments pm ON c|

expected.comment: JOIN_ON with alias-exact-match. Prefix 'c' allows c.* columns first, then syntactically valid c* scalar functions.

cases.title: WHERE: alias exact-match in multi-scope context
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM products p JOIN inventory inv ON p.id = inv.product_id WHERE p|

expected.comment: Multi-scope [products as p, inventory as inv]. Alias-exact-match for 'p'. Only p.* columns in schema order, no products.* duplicates.

cases.title: WHERE: startswith mismatch keeps generic prefix mode
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM carts ca WHERE cas|

expected.comment: Prefix 'cas' does NOT match alias 'ca' exactly. Generic prefix mode. Scope-restricted: only carts table in schema order.
